title: Dashboard: advanced filtering feature

posts.author: agranville (Andre Granville)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to know when will be released the advanced dashboard filtering capabilities (“filter your dashboards by boards, person assigned, status, date and tags”), announced on Monday’s Roadmap, for the last quarter April 1st-June 30th.
We are already in September and the status of this features looks stuck on “working on next”.

Regards, André Granville

posts.author: bhowell (Bryan Howell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d also like to see this function. We have the ability to create a column which automatically inserts the “creation date”. I’d like to be able to filter a dashboard widget by the same creation date. Is this something possible now or is it in the pipeline??
